top_signals.title: Iraq pushes Opec to let it pump more oil
top_signals.summary: Baghdad’s crude sales were drastically reduced when US-Iran war blocked exports via Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rising PCE inflation reinforces hawkish Fed turn
top_signals.summary: Higher than expected headline and core inflation in May is accompanied by some good news beneath the surface
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.summary: Justices overturn verdict in case alleging manufacturer failed to warn on herbicide’s alleged cancer risks

top_signals.summary: Jarosław Kaczyński calls on government to block Kyiv’s EU accession talks

top_signals.title: Iran tells ships in Strait of Hormuz to turn back
top_signals.summary: At least four vessels change course as Tehran challenges International Maritime Organization’s evacuation route

top_signals.title: Burnham needs to simplify UK taxes, says adviser Haldane
top_signals.summary: Former Bank of England chief economist says ‘thicket of regulation’ must be cut to boost growth

top_signals.title: Dimon promotes two potential successors at JPMorgan
top_signals.summary: Marianne Lake leaves bank as Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh handed two of its largest divisions

top_signals.title: ICEYE to double radar-satellite capacity by late 2027 as demand surges
top_signals.summary: The company's goal is to ramp up production to two satellites a week as it responds to surging demand from European militaries.

top_signals.title: Yokohama F Marinos: City Football Group offloads second club in space of six months
top_signals.summary: City Football Group, owner of 10 football clubs including Manchester City, has divested its minority stake in Japanese side Yokohama F Marinos to carmaker Nissan. The J1 League outfit will remain a CFG partner club but is now wholly owned by Nissan, who founded them as a works team in the 1970s. It comes six [...]
